C3is Inc. (Nasdaq: CISS) will release Q4 & full year 2024 financial results on March 11, 2025 after market opens.
news.summary: Athens, Greece - C3is Inc., a ship-owning company listed on Nasdaq under the symbol CISS, has disclosed it will unveil its financial results for the fourth quarter and full-year ending December 31, 2024, on March 11, 2025, post the New York market opening. This announcement comes as the company gears up to provide insights into its performance during the specified period to investors and analysts.

news.headline: Iran's UN mission: Iran has not yet received Trump's letter.
Solana (SOL) price may drop by 25% due to Trump’s new crypto order banning purchases of non-Bitcoin cryptos.
news.summary: The value of SOL is at risk of a significant decrease by 25% due to Donald Trump's recent executive order on cryptocurrencies. This order prohibits any new investments in cryptocurrencies other than Bitcoin.

news.headline: Report on J Sainsbury's tech activities and digital transformation strategy in 2024, offering insights into its initiatives and partnerships.
news.summary: A company profile for J Sainsbury 2024 has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The profile highlights the company's tech endeavors, such as digital transformation strategies, innovation programs, and technology initiatives. J Sainsbury, a multi-channel retailer, provides groceries, general merchandise, and apparel through retail outlets, website, and mobile app. The enterprise operates in the sup sector, targeting diverse customer segments.

news.headline: BP and Jera Co. form 50-50 JV in offshore wind with 13GW capacity across regions, launching by Q3.
news.summary: BP plc (NYSE:BP) has revealed a new 50-50 joint venture in offshore wind with Jera Co., Inc. The CEO of this venture will be Nathalie Oosterlinck, who is currently leading Jera Nex. The goal of this collaboration is to expedite development by utilizing their combined project pipelines and improving access to competitive financing. The joint venture is set to manage operating and development assets that could potentially generate a total of 13GW across Europe, Asia Pacific, and the US. Prior to its launch by the end of the third quarter, the joint venture is awaiting regulatory approvals.

Country artist Coffey Anderson releases new single "You Can't Spell Hero Without Her" to honor female veterans.
news.summary: A new patriotic anthem titled "You Can't Spell Hero Without Her" has been released by country music artist Coffey Anderson, inspired by a wounded female veteran. This song is a heartfelt tribute honoring women in the military. Released on March 7, 2025, the single aims to showcase the courage and sacrifices made by female service members. The artist hopes to raise awareness about the unique experiences of women in the military through this soulful composition.

news.headline: US Economic Advisor Hassett: We will see a bigger hit on government employment in the next reports.
Private equity group bids $24 billion for Walgreens, causing speculation and excitement.
Alchemy Pay is now recognized as a Self-Regulatory Organisation in Switzerland, boosting stablecoin payment solutions.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, in Singapore, the world's top fiat-crypto payment provider, Alchemy Pay, has disclosed its acceptance into the Association for Quality Assurance of Financial Services (VQF) as an acknowledged Self-Regulatory Organisation (SRO) in Switzerland.

news.headline: Trump: I would rather negotiate a deal with Iran - Fox Business Network.
Intuitive Machines lands lunar lander Athena 250m off target at southernmost point on Moon, a historic achievement.
news.summary: On March 07, 2025, Intuitive Machines, Inc. revealed that its IM-2 mission lunar lander named Athena successfully landed, coming within 250 meters of its target in the Mons Mouton region located at the lunar south pole. The landing occurred within a crater, marking it as the most southern lunar landing and surface operations ever accomplished. Intuitive Machines, identified on Nasdaq as LUNR and LUNRW, is a prominent company specializing in space exploration, infrastructure, and services.

news.headline: Medical Solutions in Omaha, NE celebrates female leadership for International Women's Day with women leading the company at the highest levels.
news.summary: In Omaha, Nebraska on March 7, 2025, as International Women's Day and Women's History Month highlight the accomplishments of women globally, Medical Solutions is recognizing the outstanding women in top leadership roles within the company. Females constitute a significant percentage...

news.headline: India's BMS market to grow at 11.6% CAGR from 2024-2030, featuring top companies like Honeywell, Schneider Electric, and more - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: A recent report has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings, providing insights on the India Building Management System market. The report forecasts a significant growth with the market revenue expected to increase at a CAGR of 11.6% between 2024 and 2030. The Building Management System market in India is witnessing substantial growth, highlighting the rising importance of efficient building solutions in the country.

news.headline: Grupo Bimbo seeks 49 girls for "The Bimbo Dream" from 22 countries, with 42 from ages 10-13 and 7 from social programs.
news.summary: In Horsham, Pennsylvania, Grupo Bimbo, a prominent player in the baking industry, along with its BIMBO® brand, a key partner of FC Barcelona, is initiating the search for 49 young girls from various nations to participate in the second installment of "The Bimbo Dream" competition. This selection process will span 22 countries, aiming to identify 42 girls aged between 10 and 13 years. Furthermore, BIMBO® plans to include seven girls from its social initiatives - "Dream Champions" in Central America and "Futbolito Bimbo" in South America.

news.headline: Mexico's President Sheinbaum: We shouldn't face reciprocal tariffs in April.
Crescent Real Estate to develop new Atten Hill residential site in Horseshoe Bay, TX, starting March 2025.
news.summary: Crescent Real Estate LLC has recently started construction on a high-end residential project named Atten Hill in Horseshoe Bay, Texas. This exclusive development is set to offer luxury living spaces in the area. The groundbreaking ceremony took place on March 7, 2025. Atten Hill is expected to bring a significant investment to the region and generate employment opportunities during its construction phase. The project aims to redefine upscale living in Horseshoe Bay and cater to the affluent demographic.

news.headline: E3 Lithium Ltd. grants equity awards and reprices stock options for a successful 2024. Trading as $EEMMF, the company is a Canadian lithium leader.
news.summary: E3 Lithium Ltd., a prominent Canadian lithium company trading under TSXV: ETL, FSE: OW3, and OTCQX: EEMMF, recently revealed details of its 2024 and 2025 compensation plans. Following a prosperous year marked by numerous company milestones, the Board of Directors approved the issuance of RSUs and repricing of options to recognize and reward the hard work of the E3 team. This move comes as a gesture of appreciation for their essential role in achieving the company's success in 2024.

news.headline: Mexico's President Sheinbaum: The auto sector could produce even more in Mexico in complying with USMCA norms.
ACTFL 2025 Convention to feature Hamilton actor Miguel Cervantes as Opening Keynote, and Dr. Steve Boyes as Closing Keynote.
news.summary: Alexandria, Virginia - On March 7, 2025, ACTFL revealed their lineup for the 2025 Annual Convention and World Languages Expo. Hamilton performer Miguel Cervantes will give the Opening Keynote Speech, with Dr. Steve Boyes set to close the event. This announcement marks a significant highlight for the convention, drawing attention to the event's prominence.

Research report on Caterpillar's digital transformation strategies, tech initiatives, innovation programs. Manufacturer of construction, transportation, energy equipment.
news.summary: Dublin, – A comprehensive company profile of Caterpillar Inc. for the year 2024 is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report delves into the tech aspects of the company, focusing on its digital transformation strategies, innovation programs, and technology initiatives. Caterpillar Inc. is a renowned manufacturer specializing in construction, transportation, and energy equipment. It is involved in the design, manufacturing, marketing, and sale of construction and mining equipment. The report offers valuable insights into the company's tech landscape, highlighting key information for interested parties.

news.headline: AUGA group, AB to have Extraordinary General Meeting on March 19, 2025 at Konstitucijos ave 21C, Vilnius for restructuring.
news.summary: AUGA Group, AB, which is currently undergoing restructuring and has the code 126264360, with its registered office at Konstitucijos avenue 21C in Vilnius, is issuing further details regarding the upcoming Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders scheduled for March 19, 2025.

news.headline: Highlights from US job report: February data revealed 244,000 jobs added, with unemployment rate at 4%.
Frontier Airlines to operate from JFK Terminal 6 in 2026, part of a project by JMP at JFK Airport.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, JFK Millennium Partners (JMP) announced that they had been chosen by the Port Authority of New York & New Jersey to construct and manage Terminal 6 (T6) at John F. Kennedy International Airport. This new facility is expected to be a state-of-the-art development. Additionally, Frontier Airlines, listed on Nasdaq, is collaborating on this project. This partnership aims to enhance the airport's operations and services.

news.headline: White House: The jobs data shows that the manufacturing industry is rebounding.
76% of Americans plan to celebrate St. Patrick's Day weekend; all ages participate in festivities.
news.summary: A recent national survey indicates that the upcoming St. Patrick's Day weekend in 2025 will be widely celebrated by 76% of Americans. The festive holiday, famous for its association with wearing green and enjoying traditional Irish cuisine, attracts an array of participants across all age groups. The survey findings highlight the enthusiastic engagement of people of all ages in the celebrations associated with St. Patrick's Day.

news.headline: Gevo projects significant Adjusted EBITDA growth in 2025, ending Q4 with $259.0 million in cash.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, Gevo, Inc. highlighted their focus on achieving significant growth in Adjusted EBITDA in 2025. The company, known for developing affordable, sustainable hydrocarbon fuels and chemicals that lower greenhouse gas emissions, shared a business update. They reported closing the fourth quarter with $259.0 million in cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash. Gevo, listed on NASDAQ as GEVO, emphasized their commitment to expanding their financial performance and advancing their renewable energy solutions without mentioning the specific source of the announcement.

news.headline: Volaris reports 85% load factor for February 2025.
news.summary: Mexico City, March 07, 2025 - Controladora Vuela Compañía de Aviación, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: VLRS and BMV: VOLAR), known as Volaris, a leading ultra-low-cost carrier operating in Mexico, the United States, Central, and South America, has released its preliminary traffic data for February 2025.

news.headline: FitLife Brands will report Q4 and full year fiscal 2024 financial performance on March 27, 2025. ($FTLF)
news.summary: FitLife Brands, Inc., based in Omaha, NE, revealed its intention to disclose the financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of fiscal 2024 on March 27, 2025. The company, known for its nutritional supplements and wellness items, trades on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol FTLF. This news was shared on March 07, 2025.
